# Security Review

## Artifact Under Review

Link to the lab, workflow, accelerator, or pull request.

## Security-Relevant Change

Describe the security-sensitive behavior.

## Permissions Required

List repository, workflow, cloud, token, or system permissions.

## Data Handled

Describe data types handled by the artifact.

## Secret Handling

Describe whether secrets are required and how they are protected.

## Abuse or Failure Modes

List realistic ways this could fail or be misused.

## Mitigations

Describe controls that reduce risk.

## Reviewer Notes

Add any specific review questions.
